next
08Reflection
What I learned, and what I'd test next.
Redesigning a shipped app meant respecting what already worked while being honest about what didn't. The biggest lesson was restraint — the hardest cuts, the upsell nags and the fifth tab, did the most for clarity. The rating moving from 2.3 to 4.2 told me the hardware was never the problem; the experience was.
What I'd test next
Three bets I'd want real-world data on before calling it done.
01
Onboarding activation
Measure how far the guided setup lifts day-one activation against the old drop-into-home flow.
02
Social retention
Watch whether Fit Crew challenges hold 30-day retention, and tune the nudges that risk feeling like pressure.
03
Daybreak in the wild
Ship light mode to a cohort and check real-world legibility outdoors, where most glances actually happen.
Good products are never finished — they're just worth opening again.
